hero.title: Your Complete Guide to Medicinal Herbs
hero.subtitle: Explore 2,700+ herbs, calculate precise dosages, check drug interactions, and consult our AI herbalist — all in one place.

features.title: Everything You Need for Herbal Wellness
features.subtitle: Professional-grade tools built on scientific research and traditional knowledge.

herbs.title: 2,700+ Medicinal Herbs
herbs.description: The most comprehensive herbal database available. Detailed profiles with active compounds, traditional uses, and modern applications.

calculator.title: Precision Dosage Calculator
calculator.description: Calculate safe dosages using Clark's Rule, Young's Rule, BSA, and Fried's Rule. Get personalized recommendations based on age and weight.

interactions.title: Drug Interaction Checker
interactions.description: Cross-reference your medications with our database. Identify mild, moderate, severe, and contraindicated combinations.

ai.title: AI Virtual Herbalist
ai.description: Ask questions about herbs, dosages, and safety. Powered by evidence-based sources including WHO monographs and PubMed research.

cta.subtitle: Browse our comprehensive database for free. No account required.

about.title: About 1Herb
about.missionText: We believe everyone deserves access to reliable, evidence-based herbal medicine information.

about.sourcesText: Information sourced from WHO monographs, German Commission E, and peer-reviewed research.
